title: chrysochosma schaffneri var. nealleyi
intro: Chrysochosma schaffneri var. nealleyi, also known as Nealley's Desert Marigold, is a rare and endangered succulent plant species native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Chrysochosma schaffneri var. nealleyi include its potential to treat various ailments, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
